features.name: event array declaration with multiple elements
features.description: Code should include a declaration of an array of SystemVerilog events with more than one element

features.name: event array variable indexing in event wait
features.description: Code should include an event wait statement using an arrayed event accessed with a variable index inside procedural code

features.name: event array variable indexing in event trigger
features.description: Code should include an event trigger statement targeting an arrayed event accessed with a variable index inside a fork/join_none block

features.name: multiple event arrays with same index variable in nested fork
features.description: Code should include multiple arrays of events accessed with the same index variable within a nested fork/join_none structure in a task
